data.body: Implemented: _write_link_event now routes through rebar._commands._seam.append_event -> _store.event_append.write_and_push. Deleted ~150 LOC of hand-rolled flock/git/push-retry. LINK events carry real author/env_id; no double HLC tick. Verified: 60 graph + 70 link/unblock/interface-facade (real-store) + 15 reconciler link tests pass; ruff clean. Removed 2 obsolete push-retry tests; added autouse fixture for bare-dir graph trackers. Commit cf40088a.
